summary.summary: Modify shouldDisplayHintBinding in Trio/Sources/Modules/DynamicSettings/View/DynamicSettingsRootView.swift so the binding setter also handles true by seeding a placeholder HintPayload(label: "", content: AnyView(EmptyView())) when hintPayload is nil; previously the setter only cleared hintPayload on false, which dropped the toggle to true and prevented help content from being presented. (Sources: diff:2c14ccf18b07, file:9e4d41cb1ad6, pr:gordolio/Trio#1158)
summary.userFacingImpact: Restores the question-mark help buttons on the Dynamic Settings page so taps for Adjustment Factor, Weighted Average of TDD, and Adjust Basal present their help sheet (these taps previously did nothing). (Sources: pr:nightscout/Trio#1158, pr:gordolio/Trio#1158, commit:e331fc0755c743ccfbaea4e162ca67ecb3b34241)
